description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tmaier/docker-compose:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called test and a job named test that runs in this stage. The test job should execute the following shell commands in order: `docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up --build -d`, `docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml run consensus npm run build`, `docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml run consensus npm run test-all`, and finally `docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml down`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
